topic: Content Creator: how teens make $100-$5K/mo posting short videos
caption:
Your phone is already a money printer.
Teens with 5K–10K followers land brand deals paying $100–$500 per post.
Pick one niche. Post 3x a week. Stack the checks.
Learn the full playbook → hustleup.us
